name: BRF ADR 1
summary: BRF S.A. is a Brazilian food company, one of the largest in the world, engaged in the production and sale of poultry, pork, and processed foods. The company's products are sold both domestically and internationally, under brands such as Sadia, Perdigão, and Qualy. BRF is headquartered in Itajaí, Santa Catarina, Brazil.
